message:
fix(obligation): add abort_by_id for drain paths and reject leaked on reset

Three changes to ObligationLedger:

1. New abort_by_id(): resolves an obligation by ID without needing the
   original linear token. Intended for drain/recovery paths that
   enumerate pending_ids_for_region() and need to abort deterministically.
   The cancellation drain test now uses abort_by_id() instead of
   mark_leaked(), giving clean accounting (aborted, not leaked).

2. reset() now also rejects leaked obligations (not just pending),
   preventing silent erasure of leak diagnostics.

3. New test: reset_panics_if_leaked_obligation_exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
